hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; if npm run build -w packages/tokens > /tmp/wend-ui-tokens-build.log 2>&1; then STATUS_MSG="wend-ui tokens rebuilt successfully."; else STATUS_MSG="wend-ui token rebuild failed or was skipped (dependencies may not be installed yet) — tokens may be stale, run npm install then npm run build -w packages/tokens manually."; fi; CONTEXT="Session start: $STATUS_MSG If this session touches design tokens or components, proactively check Figma sync before making changes — use get_tokens/list_components (wend-ui-design-sync MCP) together with Figma's MCP read tools (get_variable_defs, get_metadata) to run diff_tokens/diff_component, and mention any drift found."; jq -n --arg ctx "$CONTEXT" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: $ctx}}'
hooks.statusMessage: Rebuilding wend-ui tokens and checking Figma sync context...
